data.body: R7 (b1a4) IMPLEMENTED + PUSHED: Gerrit #761 (stacked on #760), commit d5ec73bc. gate_eval_instrumentation.py (pure classify 7/8 cascade + compute_metrics + subprocess corpus refresh + sidecar dedup-union) + golden test (5 pass) + README instrumentation section + docs/plan-review-gate.md 'Blocking-FP-proxy demotion' playbook + gate_eval_metrics.json snapshot (37 criteria; E1 crit bfp=14.3%, COH=10% — real signal). Proven: --verify-repro 7/8 exit0, --emit non-trivial, lint/typecheck GREEN. Awaiting Verified+LLM-Review on #760+#761. E2/E3/E6 plan re-reviews (from subagent rewrites) running.
